assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support lifecycle vs 14 months for Regular'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention any additional costs associated with Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response mentions Extended runs 6-12 months behind Regular but doesn't clarify that it's the same versions kept available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Slower feature adoption' and 'Potential compatibility gaps with newer GCP services' as drawbacks

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --release-channel=extended --region=YOUR_REGION'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response provides command to check available versions and notes that 1.31 likely isn't available yet on Extended

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Compliance-friendly for organizations requiring longer support cycles' and 'Better for production stability'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly state that upgrades are still required within the 24-month window

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that minor version upgrades are not automated and must be manually initiated
